name: ai-repo-agent
description: AI Agent - GitHub Repository Cloner with Code Assistant

scripts.dev: npm run cleanup && concurrently --kill-others --success first --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=512 npm run start:dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1024 npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
